name: Story Video Generator
description: Complete AI video pipeline: story prompt -> characters -> scenes -> videos -> narration -> final movie with music. Generates 2-3 characters and creates consistent visual scenes.

data.label: Story Prompt
data.value: A magical adventure in an enchanted forest

data.template:
Create a visual story about: {{topic}}

NUMBER OF CHARACTERS: {{numCharacters}} (create exactly this many distinct characters for the story)

RULES:
1. Create {{numCharacters}} DISTINCT main characters with unique appearances
2. Each character needs a DETAILED visual description (species/type, colors, clothing, distinguishing features)
3. Characters should appear consistently throughout the story
4. Choose 4-6 scenes that showcase the characters
5. IMPORTANT: Each scene should have AT MOST 2 characters present (for image generation quality)
6. Rotate characters across scenes so all {{numCharacters}} characters appear throughout the story
7. Each narration should be 1-2 sentences

CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS:
- Give each character a unique name
- Describe their physical appearance in detail (colors, size, clothing, features)
- Make characters visually distinct from each other
- Characters can be humans, animals, fantasy creatures, or anything that fits the story

SCENE CHARACTER LIMIT:
- Maximum 2 characters per scene (1 or 2, never more)
- This is critical for image quality - scenes with too many characters look cluttered
- Distribute characters across scenes so each character appears in multiple scenes

CRITICAL IMAGE PROMPT RULES:
- Each scene needs TWO image prompts: start_image_prompt and end_image_prompt
- EVERY image prompt MUST include FULL descriptions of ALL characters present in the scene (max 2)
- Copy-paste the exact character descriptions each time
- The START and END images should show clear visual progression
- Use WIDESCREEN composition (landscape orientation, cinematic framing)

CRITICAL VIDEO PROMPT RULES:
- video_prompt describes the MOTION/ACTION between start and end
- MUST include full character descriptions for all characters in scene
- MUST include the setting/environment
- MUST describe the action/movement
- MUST end with "no voiceover, silent"

Style: {{style}}

Output JSON:
{
  "title": "Story Title",
  "characters": [
    {
      "name": "Character Name",
      "description": "Full detailed visual description (type, colors, size, clothing, distinguishing features)"
    }
  ],
  "mood": "overall mood/tone",
  "sceneCount": <number>,
  "scenes": [
    {
      "number": 1,
      "title": "Scene Title",
      "charactersPresent": ["Character1 Name"],
      "narration": "Voice-over text...",
      "start_image_prompt": "[FULL descriptions of characters present - max 2], [pose/action], [setting], widescreen, {{style}}",
      "end_image_prompt": "[FULL descriptions of characters - max 2], [new pose after progression], [setting], widescreen, {{style}}",
      "video_prompt": "[FULL character descriptions], [setting], [action description], no voiceover, silent"
    }
  ]
}

data.systemPrompt: You are a visual story creator. Create stories with distinct, visually interesting characters. Each character must have a unique, detailed appearance. Output valid JSON only.

data.template:
Character portrait of {{name}}: {{description}}

IMPORTANT:
- Full body view, centered composition
- Simple solid color or gradient background
- Focus ONLY on the character, no other characters or complex scenery
- High quality, detailed character rendering
- Style: {{style}}

Rate this character image. Be LENIENT - only reject for OBVIOUS defects.

CHARACTER PROMPT: {{prompt}}

Only flag if CLEARLY visible:
- 3+ arms or legs obviously shown
- Severely distorted face (missing eyes, melted)
- Major quality issues

Artistic style variations are OK. When in doubt, give rating 8+.

Reply with JSON:
{"rating": 1-10, "issues": "obvious problems or 'none'", "fixPrompt": "fix prompt or empty"}

data.systemPrompt: Rate character images. Be LENIENT - only flag OBVIOUS, CLEARLY VISIBLE defects. Output JSON: {"rating": 1-10, "issues": "what's wrong", "fixPrompt": "fix prompt"}. Only deduct points for: clearly visible extra limbs (3+ arms/legs clearly shown), severely distorted faces (missing eyes, melted features), or major quality issues. Artistic stylization is fine. When in doubt, approve. Default to rating 8+ unless there's an obvious problem.

data.template:
You are a video prompt engineer specializing in AI video generation. Refine the following video prompt using best practices for LTX-2 video generation.

## LTX-2 PROMPTING GUIDE

**Core Principles:**
Effective prompts paint a complete narrative arc with natural flow. Combine cinematography language, scene-setting, character details, action sequences, camera movements, and audio descriptions into a single cohesive paragraph.

**Key Elements:**
1. SHOT ESTABLISHMENT: Use specific film terminology ("cinematic close-up", "wide establishing shot")
2. SCENE DETAILS: Layer in lighting conditions, color palettes, textures, atmospheric qualities
3. ACTION SEQUENCE: Write movement as natural progression, use present-tense verbs for continuous motion
4. CHARACTER DEFINITION: Provide age, appearance, clothing, emotional cues through physical language
5. CAMERA LANGUAGE: Specify movements with clarity ("dolly back", "pan left", "handheld tracking")
6. AUDIO DESCRIPTION: Describe ambient soundscapes, but end with "no dialogue, silent" for video-only generation

**Best Practices:**
- Maintain 4-8 descriptive sentences
- Use present tense throughout
- Match detail complexity to shot scale
- Avoid vague emotional labels - show feelings through gesture and expression
- Avoid readable text/logos, complex physics, scene overload

## ORIGINAL PROMPT TO REFINE:
{{rawPrompt}}

## VISUAL STYLE:
{{style}}

## INSTRUCTIONS:
Rewrite this prompt following the LTX-2 guide above. Create a single cohesive paragraph that:
1. Establishes the shot type and framing
2. Describes lighting, atmosphere, and mood through visual details
3. Shows character actions and emotions through physical movement
4. Specifies camera movement if applicable
5. Ends with "no dialogue, silent"

Output ONLY the refined prompt, nothing else.

data.systemPrompt: You are a video prompt engineer. Analyze the provided image and refine the prompt to accurately describe the scene. Output only the refined prompt, no explanations or formatting.

data.prompt: A person speaking naturally, realistic, high quality
